creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Feb 05, 2014 at 10:04:54AM +0000, Vladislav wrote:
> 
> >Number:         186473
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       After upgrade by pkg upgrade doesn't work mc
> >Confidential:   no
> >Severity:       non-critical
> >Priority:       medium
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >State:          open
> >Quarter:        
> >Keywords:       
> >Date-Required:
> >Class:          update
> >Submitter-Id:   current-users
> >Arrival-Date:   Wed Feb 05 10:10:00 UTC 2014
> >Closed-Date:
> >Last-Modified:
> >Originator:     Vladislav
> >Release:        Freebsd -CURRENT
> >Organization:
> Ncp
> >Environment:
> uname -a
> FreeBSD sux 11.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #1 r260364M: Mon Jan  6 09:54:43 MSK 2014     root@sux:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/PAE  i386
> 
> >Description:
> Doesnt work mc after upgrade using pkg upgrade
> mc
> /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0: Undefined symbol "__bsd_iconv"
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> pkg upgrade
> mc
> /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0: Undefined symbol "__bsd_iconv"
> >Fix:
> 
> 

You CURRENT is too old, you have to update it, nothing we can do about that,
packages are run on recent current each time there is an ABI:KBI breakage we do
update to a new version of current.

regards
Bapt
